allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\yamashita\\Documents\\katekyo"; git add src/app/globals.css src/components/layout/page-content.tsx src/app/\(app\)/layout.tsx src/components/ui/button.tsx src/components/layout/bottom-nav.tsx src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx src/app/\(app\)/billing/loading.tsx prisma/schema.prisma src/app/\(app\)/billing/actions.ts src/app/\(app\)/billing/page.tsx "src/app/\(app\)/homework/[id]/delete-homework-button.tsx" "src/app/\(app\)/homework/[id]/page.tsx")

PowerShell($p = Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Filter "ResponsivelyApp.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { $p.FullName } else { "not found in LOCALAPPDATA" })

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($procId in $pids\) { Get-Process -Id $procId -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path })

PowerShell(\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 27916"\).CommandLine; Stop-Process -Id 27916 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "port 3000 still in use" } else { "port 3000 freed" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "Stopping PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } } } else { Write-Output "No process listening on port 3000" })

PowerShell($photos = \(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\yamashita\\Documents\\katekyo\\src\\app\\\(app\)\\homework\\photos" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count; $templates = \(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\yamashita\\Documents\\katekyo\\src\\app\\\(app\)\\homework\\templates" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count; "photos: $photos files, templates: $templates files")
